paperpile_fullstack.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
paperpile_fullstack.summary: Full-stack engineer with a frontend and product-delivery core, plus 4+ years building production applications across healthcare, logistics, and digital product environments. Strong experience with React, React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, REST APIs, Firebase, and shipping reliable user-facing features across web and mobile contexts. Comfortable owning features end to end, collaborating asynchronously, and improving product quality through debugging, iteration, and practical engineering discipline.

bullets: Built and maintained production applications using React Native, JavaScript, and API-connected workflows for operational teams, with emphasis on reliability and usability.
Integrated REST APIs and Redux-based state management for complex user flows and data-heavy product interactions.
Improved quality through debugging, structured testing, and iterative enhancement of user-facing features.

Developed React Native components and customer-facing product flows for an e-commerce platform in a remote collaboration environment.

Partnered with backend teams to deliver API-connected features and improve the product experience end to end.
